response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the 'XY&Z' lyrics identified in the reference JSON, including the live variation with mid-song MC. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics; manual transcription was performed for intro visual text and the MC segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal bursts and on-screen text duration. Applied instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' = Line 2 's') during the fast-paced chorus and bridge.

subtitles.original: こよりは マヨネーズ で 回復 した
subtitles.english: [Visual Text: Koyori recovered with mayonnaise]

subtitles.original: 助手くんが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [Visual Text: Joshu-kun joined the party!]

subtitles.original: AIこよりが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [Visual Text: AI Koyori joined the party!]

subtitles.original: もふこよが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [Visual Text: Mofukoyo joined the party!]

subtitles.original: へい！カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
subtitles.english: Hey! Like the morning sun illuminating Kalos,

subtitles.original: （ニトロチャージ熱く行こうぜ）
subtitles.english: (Nitro Charge, let's go hot!)

subtitles.original: さあ！進もうぜ いつでも準備はOK
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's proceed, we're always ready, OK.

subtitles.original: （かたやぶりへんげんじざいで）
subtitles.english: (Breaking through, ever-changing!)

subtitles.original: 重なり合う想いがシンクロして
subtitles.english: Our overlapping feelings sync up,

subtitles.original: 決して消えない絆になるから
subtitles.english: and become a bond that will never disappear.

subtitles.original: どこまでも強くなれる
subtitles.english: We can become stronger no matter how far,

subtitles.original: 俺たちなら woh woh woh yeah
subtitles.english: if it's us, woh woh woh yeah!

subtitles.original: いくZ！！激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! A fiercely burning battle,

subtitles.original: いくZ！！ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: let's go Z!! A crisis is an opportunity!

subtitles.original: いこうZ！！きしかいせい 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! Desperate struggle, we'll never give up!

subtitles.original: 俺たちは諦めない
subtitles.english: We will never give up!

subtitles.original: へい！例えどんな壁が道を塞いだって
subtitles.english: Hey! Even if any kind of wall blocks the road,

subtitles.original: （いつでも当たって砕けろで）
subtitles.english: (always hit it and break through!)

subtitles.original: さあ！こうぜ いつでも準備はOK
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's go, we're always ready, OK.

subtitles.original: （かたやぶりへんげんじざいで）
subtitles.english: (Breaking through, ever-changing!)

subtitles.original: 重なり合う想いがシンクロして
subtitles.english: Our overlapping feelings sync up,

subtitles.original: 決して消えない絆になるから
subtitles.english: and become a bond that will never disappear.

subtitles.original: どこまでも強くなれる
subtitles.english: We can become stronger no matter how far,

subtitles.original: 俺たちなら woh woh woh yeah
subtitles.english: if it's us, woh woh woh yeah!

subtitles.original: いくZ！！手強いライバルたち
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! Formidable rivals,

subtitles.original: いくZ！！決めろ一撃必殺
subtitles.english: let's go Z!! Land a one-hit knockout!

subtitles.original: いこうZ！！負けられない 想いがここにあるから
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! We can't lose, our feelings are right here.

subtitles.original: 夢が俺にはあるから
subtitles.english: Because I have a dream!

subtitles.original: 博衣こよ理生誕ライブ2026、見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to Hakuui Koyori Birthday Live 2026!

subtitles.original: 神ゲーたちの神ゲームソングをいっぱい詰め込んでるのだ！
subtitles.english: I've packed in lots of god-tier game songs from god-tier games!

subtitles.original: 最後まで楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy until the very end!

subtitles.original: いくZ！！勝ちも負けも 痛みも
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! Victory, defeat, and the pain too,

subtitles.original: いくZ！！何でも分かち合える
subtitles.english: let's go Z!! we can share everything.

subtitles.original: いこうZ！！仲間がいる 俺たちは独りじゃない
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! I have comrades, we are not alone!

subtitles.original: いくZ！！激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! A fiercely burning battle,

subtitles.original: いくZ！！ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: let's go Z!! A crisis is an opportunity!

subtitles.original: いこうZ！！きしかいせい 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! Desperate struggle, we'll never give up!

subtitles.original: いくZ！！譲れない夢がある
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! There's a dream I can't yield,

subtitles.original: いくZ！！必ずゲットだぜ
subtitles.english: let's go Z!! we'll definitely get it!

subtitles.original: いこうZ！！手を伸ばして いつか描いた未来へ
subtitles.english: Let's go Z!! Reach out to the future we once envisioned,

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない高みへ
subtitles.english: to the heights that no one knows.

subtitles.original: さあ！上げてくぜ（100万ボルト）
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's crank it up (1 Million Volts)!

subtitles.original: そう！立ち向かって 共にいこうぜ
subtitles.english: Yes! Let's face it and go together,

subtitles.original: 見たことのない 夢の向こうまで
subtitles.english: to the other side of a dream never seen before!

subtitles.original: はーい！みんな！こんこよー！
subtitles.english: Hi everyone! Konkoyo!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ6期生、秘密結社holoXの頭脳、博衣こよ理だよー！
subtitles.english: I'm the brain of Secret Society holoX, Hololive's 6th gen Hakuui Koyori!

subtitles.original: 改めて今日は、博衣こよ理生誕ライブ2026にお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Once again, thank you so much for coming to Hakuui Koyori Birthday Live 2026!

subtitles.original: コメントもいっぱいありがとう！イェーイ！かっこいい？見えてるよ！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thanks for all the comments too! Yay! Do I look cool? I see you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、ライブの感想やスクショはハッシュタグを付けてたくさん呟いてね！
subtitles.english: So, please tweet your thoughts and screenshots with the hashtag!
